TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Almazbek_Atambayev, title = Almazbek_Atambayev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Almazbek_Atambayev} }

S.FORM: Almazbek Atambayev I 1956 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Almazbek Atambayev, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Kazakhstan, Kurgyzstan anini i ci Almazbek Atambayev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: a…ĺma*b~b~v…ôk atamb~b~vaj…ôb~v i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i a…ĺma*b~b~v…ôk atamb~b~vaj…ôb~v, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ka*akńßstan, ko~u~ur*j*stan anini i ¶i a…ĺma*b~b~v…ôk atamb~b~vaj…ôb~v, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Almazbek Atambayev I 1956 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Almazbek Atambayev, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Kazakhstan, Kurgyzstan anini i ci Almazbek Atambayev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
